creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 9 Sep 2006 22:57:39 +0200
Marcus von Appen <mva@sysfault.org> wrote:

> On, Fri Sep 08, 2006, Ion-Mihai Tetcu wrote:
> 
> > Synopsis: [Maintainer-update]: games/tmw unbreak on FreeBSD 4.x
> >

> > State-Changed-When: Fri Sep 8 19:02:39 UTC 2006
> > State-Changed-Why:

> > http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/tb/errors/7-HEAD-i386-myPT/tmw-0.0.20.log
> > 
> > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=103004
> > 
> 
> I cannot reproduce that behaviour on my HEAD tinderbox. Anything
> builds fine here.
> 
> Did you use any special configuration knobs for your tinderbox or
> something else?

Nop.

My head tindys were updated on
FreeBSD 7 (.) updated on 2006-09-07 12:48:57 - i386
FreeBSD 7 (.) updated on 2006-09-07 23:35:53 - amd64
maybe your is older ?
